title: OC (FL) Public Schools PD - Accurint/PSDEX Contributions

communications.subject: Florida Sunshine Law Request: OC (FL) Public Schools PD - Accurint/PSDEX Contributions
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

On March 1, 2024 the Miami Beach Police Department produced a list of local agencies that have Information Sharing Agreements related to LexisNexis Accurint Virtual Crime Center (AVCC), and that list included the "Orange County Public Schools District Police".  

We are seeking the following records:
1) Any information sharing agreement, contract, or addendum you signed with Accurint, LexisNexis, the Miami Beach Police Department, or local law enforcement consortiums. This may take the form of an MOU, or "Schedule A" document. 
2) Any invoices, payment confirmations, or details of payments to a local law enforcement consortium or to LexisNexis for a AVCC subscription. 
3) If your agency contributes data to AVCC, PSDEX, or a local law enforcement data warehouse, please provide the field names that you contribute. Responsive documents may include API documentation, XML documents/files, screenshot of configuration file, configuration instructions, or other technical documents from LexisNexis to help with integrating RMS systems. 
4) Any meeting minutes, meeting media, or presentations from when Orange County Public School District agreed to contribute data to AVCC/PSDEX (if your agency does contribute)
5) If your agency contributes data, please provide any documentation on whether that data is restricted to local consortium members, or if it is contributed to the primary PSDEX database.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Shawn Segal
